Address: Ganpati Plaza, Piprali Road, Railway Station Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: Full-service gym in Ganpati Plaza on Piprali Road. Services include weight training, cardio, strength training, weight loss, and personal training. Open Mon–Sun 4 AM–9 PM (7 days including Sunday from 4 AM). Trainer Rajveer Sir leads personalised fitness journeys. Trainer Nadeem specialises in weight loss programs.
Insights: 4.5/5 Google rating with 188 reviews. Opens at 4 AM — the earliest opening time of any gym in Sikar, catering to early risers and professionals. Open 7 days a week including Sunday. Trainer Rajveer praised as a great mentor for long-term fitness journeys (1+ years documented). Trainer Nadeem cited for excellent weight loss guidance. Located in the same Ganpati Plaza as PowerFit Gym, making this building a fitness destination hub on Piprali Road.

Address: Ram Nagar, Kishan Colony, Jat Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: Unisex gym in Kishan Colony, Jat Colony area. Services include weight training, cardio, strength training, personal training, and group fitness classes. Two daily sessions: morning (5–9 AM) and evening (4–9 PM), Mon–Sat. Welcoming owner with friendly, knowledgeable approach. Modern equipment and clean facilities.
Insights: 4.8/5 Google rating with 217 reviews. Owner praised directly by name for being exceptionally friendly and knowledgeable — unlike other gyms where trainers are rude. Unisex gym where women feel safe and welcome. Members describe making new good friends at the gym. Located in Kishan Colony / Jat Colony which is one of Sikar's most densely populated residential belt areas. One of the best genuine reviewer ratings in north Sikar.

Address: Vandemataram Chowk, Radhakishan Pura, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: Boutique strength and bodybuilding gym at Vandemataram Chowk, Radhakishan Pura. Services include weight training, yoga, diet coaching, mental health awareness, and fitness technique training. Two daily sessions: morning (5–9 AM) and evening (5–9 PM), Mon–Sat. Trainers Shubham Bhaiya and Manoj Bhaiya take a holistic approach to fitness.
Insights: 4.9/5 Google rating with 69 reviews. Owner-trainer Shubham Bhaiya teaches not just gym technique but also consistency, food, diet, mental health, and yoga — a truly holistic fitness mentor. Members describe him as a 'beast in knowledge and body.' Advanced gym in an unexpected area of Sikar — described as shocking to see such a high-quality facility. Trainer Manoj Bhaiya also praised. Calm, friendly atmosphere despite the powerful name.

Address: Jangid House, Piprali Road, Jat Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: Premium gym in Jat Colony on Piprali Road. Services include strength training, bodybuilding, cardio, personal training, and body transformation. Features branded Jerai and Pro Ultimate machines. Two daily sessions: morning (5–10:30 AM) and evening (4:30–9 PM), Mon–Sat. Trainers Ajay and Rohit provide personalised attention with proper hygiene and air fresheners maintained throughout.
Insights: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating with 610 reviews — the highest review count of any gym in Sikar city. Trainers Ajay and Rohit are consistently named and praised for their cooperative, supportive, and knowledgeable approach. Equipment exclusively from Jerai and Pro Ultimate — two of India's most respected gym equipment brands. Hygienic environment with regular air fresheners. One of the most trusted gyms in Shekhawati region.

Address: Balaji Complex, 2nd Floor, near Poonam Hotel, Palwas Road, near Salasar Stand, Golamdar Mohalla, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: Comprehensive fitness centre on the 2nd floor of Balaji Complex near Salasar Stand. Services include bodybuilding, cardiovascular training, strength training, boxing, functional fitness, and personal coaching. All certified coaches. Two daily sessions: morning (5–10:30 AM) and evening (4–9 PM), Mon–Sat. Free premium gym T-shirt with 3-month membership at Rs. 3,000.
Insights: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating with 508 reviews — second highest review count in Sikar. Offers boxing alongside conventional gym — rare in Sikar's gym market. Certified coaches across all fitness disciplines. Extremely affordable membership (Rs. 3,000 for 3 months). Located near Salasar Stand bus stop — high-footfall, central location. Coach behaviour described as highly helpful and welcoming.

Address: 2nd Floor, Great Eastern Plaza, Railway Station Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: Sikar's most luxurious gym spread across the 2nd floor of Great Eastern Plaza. Services include cardiovascular training, strength training, personal training, weight loss, bodybuilding, steam bath, and shower facilities. Five trainers on staff: Ajay Ji, Lucky Ji, CP Ji, and others. Two daily sessions: morning (5–11 AM) and evening (5–9:30 PM), Mon–Sat. Ample car and bike parking available.
Insights: 5.0/5 Google rating with 306 reviews. Self-branded as 'the most luxurious gym in Sikar.' Steam and shower facilities — rare in Sikar's gym market. Five trainers on staff ensure high personal attention ratio. Affordable subscription plans. Top-of-the-line cardio and strength machines. Described by members as the perfect gym. Located near Railway Station Colony — central accessibility. Instagram active.

Address: Devipura, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: Well-established fitness centre in Devipura. Services include CrossFit, weight training, personal training, cardio, strength conditioning, and body transformation programs. Two daily sessions: morning (5–11 AM) and evening (4–9:30 PM), Mon–Sat. Trainers Anand Sir and Ashish Bhai lead all programs with professional expertise.
Insights: 4.9/5 Google rating with 192 reviews. Trainer Anand Sir is specifically praised for producing major body transformations within 2 months of CrossFit programming. Members describe it as providing the best gym experience in all of Sikar. Proof-of-results culture: member gave demo and was convinced purely by the training quality. Located in Devipura — a growing residential zone of Sikar.

Address: Ramlila Maidan, Tilak Nagar, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: Budget-friendly, professional gym in Tilak Nagar with high-quality equipment and proper training space. Co-trainer Satyaveer Sir leads sessions. Rudeness-free environment guaranteed.
Insights: 4.9/5 Google rating with 160 reviews. Owner Ram Sir is a trained professional who creates a big-brother mentoring culture. Described as the only gym in Sikar with a completely rudeness-free environment. Trainer Ashish has high professional-level knowledge producing visible health and body changes. Affordable pricing fits all budgets. Located at Ramlila Maidan — a well-known Tilak Nagar landmark.

Address: Shiv Nagar, near Allen Coaching Centre, Ghorana Ki Dhani, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: Unisex premium gym in Shiv Nagar near Allen Coaching Centre. State-of-the-art equipment and spacious workout areas. Cleanliness is a stated priority.
Insights: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating with 119 reviews. Unisex gym — explicitly welcoming all genders with equal care. Owner praised for very positive, welcoming behaviour. Located near Allen Coaching Centre — captures the large student coaching population unique to Sikar (known across India as Rajasthan's coaching hub). State-of-the-art equipment with a warm, enthusiastic staff culture.

Address: New Indra Colony, Ward No. 54, Piprali Road, near Sunita Restaurant, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: Community-focused fitness gym in New Indra Colony on Piprali Road. Services include strength training, weight training, cardio, and personal coaching. Insights: 4.9/5 Google rating with 151 reviews. Unique for its mentor culture that extends beyond fitness — trainers genuinely care about members' overall wellbeing, not just physical results. Described as a 'positive and encouraging place' where people feel like family. Better weight training than any other gym in the area per a member. Located in New Indra Colony, a residential area off Piprali Road.

Address: 1st Floor, Suraj Sadan, Court Road, opposite Court, Doliyon Ka Bass, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: Branch of Body Power Fitness Gym on Court Road, opposite Sikar District Court. Services include weight training, cardio, strength training, free weights, and personal training. Two daily sessions: morning (5–10 AM) and evening (4–10 PM), Mon–Sat. High-quality equipment, clean facility, and a welcoming family vibe.
Insights: 4.7/5 Google rating with 364 reviews — highest review count among all Body Power branches. Located opposite Sikar District Court — captures legal professionals, court staff, and residents of Doliyon Ka Bass. Second branch of the Body Power Fitness Gym brand confirming strong multi-location growth. Members praise exceptional equipment variety and trainer dedication. Family vibe noted consistently.

Address: 1st Floor, Ganpati Plaza, Piprali Road, above Ganesham Electronics, Railway Station Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: Full-service gym on the 1st floor of Ganpati Plaza on Piprali Road. Services include weight training, cardio, strength training, and personal coaching. Insights: 4.9/5 Google rating with 159 reviews. Described as 'the most exclusive and biggest gym in all of Sikar' by one member. Trainer Nadeem is specifically highlighted for superior technical knowledge, injury prevention guidance, and a learning approach that surpasses other gyms in the city. Sunday opening is a differentiator. Mixed reviews on some equipment maintenance — an operational note.

Address: Jaipur-Bikaner Bypass Road, near Sanwali Circle, Bajaj Gram Sanwali, Sikar, Rajasthan 332021

Two daily sessions: morning (5–11 AM) and evening (4–9 PM), Mon–Sat; Sun 6–11 AM. Specially welcoming for female members with a family-like atmosphere. Located near Rameshwaram Residency and the medical college.
Insights: 4.9/5 Google rating with 71 reviews. Rated #1 gym in Sikar by members. Unique differentiator: top floor with transparent glass walls providing scenic motivating views during workouts — extremely rare in any Rajasthan gym. Female-friendly environment praised warmly. Located near Sikar Medical College, capturing a large population of medical students and healthcare professionals on the Bypass Road.

Address: Near Salasar Bus Stand, underground of Neelkanth Trading Company, Imam Ganj, Harijan Basti, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001

Experienced staff with expert knowledge.

Located near Salasar Bus Stand — a major intercity transit hub — giving it excellent visibility and footfall. Unique underground format creates a dedicated, distraction-free training environment. Serves a diverse community of students, workers, and professionals.

Address: Jaipur Road, near Krishi Upaj Mandi Gate No. 2, Shanti Nagar, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001

Insights: 4.9/5 Google rating with 42 reviews. Trainers Navin Sir, Sandeep Sir, and Aditya Sir are each named by members for life-changing transformations. Members describe completely changed lifestyle and health improvements. Budget-friendly pricing. Located near Krishi Upaj Mandi (agricultural produce market) — serves the farming, trade, and student community around Sikar's southern agricultural belt.

Address: BR Complex, Piprali Road, near Balaji Hospital, Jat Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: Well-equipped gym near Balaji Hospital on Piprali Road. Services include weight training, strength training, cardio, and general fitness training. Open Mon–Sat 5 AM–9 PM. All kinds of machines available. Supportive, positive training atmosphere.

Located on Piprali Road near Balaji Hospital — a medical corridor with high daily footfall. Part of the Piprali Road gym cluster alongside The Armstrong Gym and PowerFit Gym, making Piprali Road Sikar's most gym-dense street.

Address: Near Clock Tower, Raghunath Market, Laxmangarh, Sikar District, Rajasthan 332311
Functionality Description: The most advanced gym in Laxmangarh town, located near the iconic Clock Tower in Raghunath Market. Modern, advanced equipment with honest and experienced trainers.
Insights: 4.8/5 Google rating with 105 reviews — clearly the best-reviewed gym in Laxmangarh town. Members note this is the best gym in Laxmangarh with advanced machines at premium pricing (justified by equipment quality). One member trained 1.5 years with consistent satisfaction. Part of the Body Power brand expanding beyond Sikar city.

Address: Near Khichar Hospital, Nawalgarh Road, Ram Nagar, Kishan Colony, Charan Singh Nagar, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: Fitness gym near Khichar Hospital on Nawalgarh Road. Services include weight training, strength training, cardio, and personal fitness coaching. Insights: 4.8/5 Google rating with 11 reviews. Unique Sunday operation: 24 hours open on Sunday — a completely rare feature for a Sikar neighbourhood gym. Near Khichar Hospital on Nawalgarh Road, serving the northern residential belt of Sikar. Trainer praised for great behaviour and fitness knowledge. Named after the KGF brand, reflecting the strong influence of bodybuilding culture in Sikar's youth demographic.

Address: Near Jaipur-Bikaner Bypass, Palwas Road, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: AC gym on Palwas Road near Jaipur-Bikaner Bypass. Services include weight training, cardio, strength training, and personal coaching. Two daily sessions: morning (5–9:30 AM) and evening (4–9:30 PM), Mon–Sat. New and smooth machinery throughout. AC facility with clean, airy environment. Professional trainers and friendly owner.
Insights: 4.6/5 Google rating with 67 reviews. Described as the best gym in the city with new, smooth machinery. AC environment is a strong draw on the hot Palwas Road stretch. Members specifically note the airy, always-fresh feel of the premises due to excellent ventilation. Owner praised for friendly and welcoming nature. Located near the Bypass, serving the growing outer-ring residential community of Sikar.

Address: C-26, near Manavta Hospital, Todinagar, Sikar, Rajasthan 332021
Functionality Description: Modern, spacious gym near Manavta Hospital, Todinagar, Sikar. Sleek modern design with ample natural light. Features locker rooms and parking.
Insights: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating with 41 reviews. Upscale Version 2.0 of the Being Fit brand — described as 'a fantastic addition to the community.' Features natural light and modern design — rare aesthetic features for Sikar gyms. Locker rooms available. Described as best gym near Sanwali Circle area with excellent equipment and experienced trainers. Serves the Todinagar residential zone on the southern edge of Sikar near the Bypass.

Address: Fatehpur Road, behind Passport Seva Kendra, Anand Nagar, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
Functionality Description: Third branch of Body Power Fitness Gym in the Anand Nagar area on Fatehpur Road. Services include weight training, cardio, strength training, and personal coaching. Two daily sessions: morning (5–10 AM) and evening (4–10 PM), Mon–Sat. Good facilities and nice management.
Insights: 4.1/5 Google rating with 63 reviews. Third location of the multi-branch Body Power Fitness Gym brand in Sikar. Situated behind Passport Seva Kendra on Fatehpur Road — a landmark high-footfall location. Serves the Anand Nagar and North Sikar residential belt. Mixed reviews suggesting this branch has slightly lower quality than the flagship Court Road and Palwas Road branches. Still a known and trusted brand name in Sikar's gym market.

Address: Ward No. 21, Ganwari Mod, near Govt. School, Neem Ka Thana, Sikar District, Rajasthan 332713
Functionality Description: Underground fitness gym at Ganwari Mod near Govt. School, Neem Ka Thana. Services include weight training, cardio, strength training, personal training, and body transformation. Open Mon–Sat 5:30 AM–8:30 PM. Underground design provides a distraction-free, dedicated training environment. Female-friendly atmosphere with state-of-the-art equipment.
Insights: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating with 119 reviews — the highest-rated gym in Neem Ka Thana. Underground design is a unique architectural differentiator. Female members specifically praise the safe, comfortable, and confidence-building environment. Trainer is exceptionally skilled and supportive, guiding at each person's own pace. Neem Ka Thana is a rapidly developing town in Sikar district with a population of ~75,000. Very few high-quality gyms serve this market.

Address: Ward No. 7, near Kamla Modi Dharamshala, Adarsh Colony, Yadav Colony, Neem Ka Thana, Sikar District, Rajasthan 332713
Functionality Description: Established health club in Adarsh Colony, Neem Ka Thana. Services include weight training, strength training, bodybuilding, cardio, and personal coaching. Open Mon–Sat 5 AM–8:30 PM. All major equipment available. Trainer is humble, supportive, and knowledgeable.
Insights: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating with 147 reviews — the most reviewed gym in Neem Ka Thana. Members describe best transformation and training experience in Neem Ka Thana. Trainer praised for humble nature and deep equipment knowledge. Located near Kamla Modi Dharamshala in Adarsh Colony — central and accessible location. Competes with D' Fitness for leadership in the Neem Ka Thana gym market. Strong community trust established over years of operation.

Address: Near Asharam Mandir, Biraniya, Fatehpur Shekhawati, Rajasthan 332301
Functionality Description: AC gym near Asharam Mandir in Biraniya, Fatehpur. Services include weight training, cardio, strength training, personal training, and body transformation. Two daily sessions: morning (5–10 AM) and evening (5–10 PM), Mon–Sat. Air-conditioned with music system. High-quality equipment and trained, friendly staff.
Insights: 4.8/5 Google rating with 35 reviews — one of the top-rated gyms in Fatehpur Shekhawati. Described as the best gym in Fatehpur with high-quality machines and transformation expert trainers. AC facility is a premium differentiator in Fatehpur where most gyms are non-AC. Fatehpur Shekhawati is a historic commercial town ~70 km north of Sikar city, known for its painted havelis and merchant community. Very few premium quality gyms serve this market.

Address: Dhanuka Complex, near Sabji Mandi, Fatehpur Shekhawati, Rajasthan 332301
Functionality Description: Established gym in the Dhanuka Complex near Sabji Mandi, Fatehpur. Services include weight training, strength training, bodybuilding, and cardio. Open Mon–Sat 4 AM–10 PM. Best equipment and service with humble staff. Originally known as Dhanuka Gym, rebranded under owner Sonu Lalwani.
Insights: 4.5/5 Google rating with 33 reviews. Opens at 4 AM — extremely early opening rare for a Fatehpur area gym, catering to agricultural workers and early risers. Owner Sonu Lalwani confirmed by Google reviews. One of the oldest gyms in Fatehpur, previously operating as Dhanuka Gym before rebranding.
